title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Code Llama, and other large language models locally on macOS and Linux with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, list, copy and delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; run and chat with models from Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as an LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chat, code highlighting, RAG and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, completion, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to generate, chat and manage models from Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Rust-based TUI client for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub-Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model inside a Discord server using slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU support and automatic model pulling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and compose files for running Ollama containerised on CPU or NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template for building RAG applications with Ollama, LangChain and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; mention the bot in channels or DM to chat with local models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI for Ollama featuring markdown, code blocks, LaTeX and multi-model selection.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n community node that enables no-code workflows to generate text, chat and embeddings with Ollama.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: Lightweight PyPI wrapper that simplifies pulling and chatting with Mistral-based models via Ollama.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app providing REST endpoints and admin UI to manage and query Ollama models from Django projects.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate offering typed async/await bindings to the Ollama HTTP API.
